endpoints.name: Reachable Range
endpoints.description: Calculates a set of locations that can be reached from the origin point.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{CONTENTTYPE}} with a real contenttype. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Reachable Range
endpoints.description: Calculates a set of locations that can be reached from the origin point. POST method handles additionally parameters: supportingPoints, allowVignette, avoidVignette, avoidAreas.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{CONTENTTYPE}} with a real contenttype. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Calculate Route
endpoints.description: Calculates a route between an origin and a destination.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{CONTENTTYPE}} with a real contenttype. Replace {{LOCATIONS}} with a real locations.

endpoints.name: Calculate Route
endpoints.description: Calculates a route between an origin and a destination. POST method handles additionally parameters: supportingPoints, allowVignette, avoidVignette, avoidAreas.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{CONTENTTYPE}} with a real contenttype. Replace {{LOCATIONS}} with a real locations.
